About Us

Precision shrink films, made in India for the world.

Headquartered in India, Baba Multifilms LLP is a specialist manufacturer and exporter of LDPE and LLDPE shrink films. From single-SKU bundling rolls to multi-gauge film for automated shrink tunnels, we produce consistent, export-grade film backed by disciplined quality control and on-time dispatch.

Our teams serve customers across India and international markets with flexible order sizes, custom widths, and gauges tailored to your packaging line.


Get in Touch →

Product Range

Films engineered for
every line speed.

Standard rolls or custom spec — widths, gauges and treatments dialled in for your application.

🎞️

LDPE Shrink Film

Heavy-duty low-density polyethylene film for bundling, pallet protection and industrial loads with strong seal integrity.

⚡

LLDPE Shrink Film

Linear low-density polyethylene with superior puncture resistance and stretch — built for high-speed automatic lines.

📦

Collation Shrink Film

Multi-pack bundling film for bottles, cans and retail-ready cases — tight shrink, clean presentation.

⚙️

Custom Widths & Gauges

Bespoke rolls built to your line spec — widths, microns, and core sizes matched to your application.
